subcodes.first_line: O ye who are possessed of insight and steadfastness! In the Abhá Kingdom your names are mentioned and your remembrance is perpetual and renowned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل بصیرت و استقامت در ملکوت ابهی نامتان مذکور و یادتان مستمر و مشهور و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @angels, @fire and light; fire and water, @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God
